title: The Legend of Zelda: Link's Awakening
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Action-Adventure game.

A small solitary adventurer seen from behind with a short sword at their side in a calm island shoreline facing a single mysterious mountain landmark across open water, standing still in sea wind as if arriving at the start of a dreamlike journey.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- Game Boy aesthetic, green monochrome palette, crisp pixel forms, portable mood, and very clean value separation
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- lonely, dreamlike, adventurous

Composition:
- small foreground figure near the lower edge, broad water in the middle, one dominant distant landmark, simple clouds, strong negative space
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark

Important - do NOT include: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Link likeness, avoid exact island mountain shapes from official art, avoid official shield and hat details, avoid title-screen text or logos, avoid resemblance to link, avoid resemblance to zelda. No copyrighted characters, no logos, no recognizable IP.
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Link likeness, avoid exact island mountain shapes from official art, avoid official shield and hat details, avoid title-screen text or logos, avoid resemblance to link, avoid resemblance to zelda
revised_prompt: Create an original illustration inspired by classic Action-Adventure games but entirely non-specific to any franchise. Showcase a small solitary character, seen from behind, with a short sword on their side standing on a calm shoreline of an island. They are facing a single, mysterious mountain landmark across an open water, as if ready to embark on a dreamlike journey. The visual style should pull inspiration from Game Boy's green monochrome palette and crisp pixel forms, delivering a clean and modern interpretation of retro game aesthetics. The mood should evoke feelings of solitude, adventure, and dreamlike wonder. The composition should include the small figure near the lower edge, broad water in the middle, and the dominant landmark in the distance. But remember to avoid recreating any specific game assets, logos, or characters. The image needs to be of high clarity, strong contrast, and minimal noise, without any text or watermarks.
